title: pdichiaro/atacseq pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the samplesheet file provided with params.input. Follows nf-core ATAC-seq standard format.

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces. Use only alphanumeric characters, underscores, dots, and dashes.

fastq_1.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 1 must be provided, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'

fastq_2.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 2 cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'. Leave empty for single-end data.

replicate.errorMessage: Replicate number must be a positive integer (1, 2, 3, ...)

antibody.errorMessage: Antibody/target name. Use alphanumeric characters, underscores, dots, and dashes.
